name: HELIOS-B vutrisiran ATTR cardiomyopathy trial
summary: A phase 3 randomized trial testing subcutaneous vutrisiran in ATTR cardiomyopathy for up to 36 months.
population: 655 patients with ATTR cardiomyopathy, including patients receiving and not receiving tafamidis at baseline

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Protein Aggregate Clearance because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes, function, and safety in 655 patients with ATTR cardiomyopathy, including patients receiving and not receiving tafamidis at baseline. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
